description:
Callback delivery retry configuration

This schema is part of the Long Term Support of Beckn Protocol V2.0 API specification and MUST NOT be extended. Any domain-specific extension must use the property of this schema which is of type Attribute.

maxPayloadBytes.description: Maximum callback payload size in bytes

maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts before sending to DLT

maxDelaySeconds.description: Maximum delay cap for exponential backoff

backoffMultiplier.description: Delay multiplied by this after each retry

title: DeliveryPolicy
